title: Subquery as join source
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.users_joined_to_top_commenters/0` that joins users with a subquery returning `top_commenters` (user_id + total_count). The subquery counts comments grouped by user_id and filters `having count(c.id) >= 10`. The outer query uses `join: tc in subquery(top_commenters_query)` and selects `{u.id, u.name, tc.total_count}`. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: Subquery-as-join-source pattern is distinct from subquery-in-where. Requires both an inner aggregate and an outer join.
